caption: A man wearing a brown blazer, a light-colored button-down shirt, and khaki pants stands in front of a large whiteboard in a classroom or lecture hall setting. A round analog clock is mounted on the wall above the whiteboard, and a blue spray bottle sits on a ledge to the right. The whiteboard is covered in handwritten chemical equations and calculations, including the text "[CH3CH2COOH] = 0.1000 M", "[NaOH] = 0.1000 M", and "FA = 1.9 x 10^-5". In the initial frames, the man gestures toward the writing on the board with his right hand. As the sequence progresses, he moves to the right side of the frame, holding a small black electronic device, possibly a calculator or phone, in his hands. He continues to stand near the board, where further calculations such as "[OH-] = 0.001000 mol" are visible.
